title: saxifraga groenlandica subsp. obscura
intro: Saxifraga groenlandica subsp. obscura is a lesser-known subspecies of the Saxifraga groenlandica plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Arctic tundra regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. Research has also suggested that Saxifraga groenlandica subsp. obscura may provide health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health, although more studies are needed to confirm these findings. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga groenlandica subsp. obscura are typically made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its potential health benefits.
